ocr_findings.description: Page number '414' appears at end of OCR output as trailing line — cosmetic positioning artifact.

reviewer_notes: Page is mostly whitespace below the summary box — content covers end of absolute path explanation (/音楽/どんぐりころころ.mp3 example) and the '試験にはコレが出る！' summary box with 4 bullet points on root/current directory and absolute/relative paths. All 4 bullets correctly captured. Image placeholder for callout mascot is acceptable.
